raw_spice:
*******************************************************************************
**	DISCLAIMER
*******************************************************************************
**	This model is provided as is, where is, and with no warranty of any kind
**	either expressed or implied, including but not limited to any implied
**	warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose.
*******************************************************************************

***********************************************************
****	Wolfspeed SiC Schottky diode C6D10065E Spice Library
****	Version 1.0 Date: 05-29-2020
****
***********************************************************
****	Revision record
****	Version 1	Initial Release - Datasheet Rev A, 05-2020
****
*********************************************************************************
.subckt C6D10065E A K Case Tj Tc 

.param p11 = -55
.param p12 = 225

R101 Tr 0	1E6
E101 Tr 0 	value {limit(V(Tj),p11,p12)}

**************
*Schottky diode A
**************
L_anode1	A	AD1	6n 
RAK1	AD1	K	54E6
xgAK	K	AD14	A	CAK_C6D10065
D1	AD14	K	CPW6-0650-Z010A temp=25
Er 	AD13 	AD14	value {((665.2n*(V(Tr)**2)+46.972u*V(Tr)+26.554m))*v(net1)}
Eth	AD12	AD13	value {404.95n*(V(Tr)**2)-1.087m*V(Tr)+0.2285}
vdiode1	AD1	AD12	0

Esn1	net1	0	value {I(vdiode1)}
Rsn1	net1	0	1E6

R11	Case	K	0.1m
R11p	Case	K	0.1m

***********
*PiN diode A
***********

D2	AD4	K	PiN_CPW6-0650-Z010A temp=25
En1	AD3 	AD4	value {Limit(-30m*V(Tj)+10.65,1,15)}
Er1	AD2	AD3	value {0.026*v(net2)}
vdiode2	AD1 	AD2	0

Esn2	net2	0	value {I(vdiode2)}
Rsn2	net2	0	1E6


**********************************************************
.model CPW6-0650-Z010A d(is=0.88p rs=0 Cjo=0.1p bv=779)
.model PiN_CPW6-0650-Z010A d(is=0.88p rs=0 Cjo=0.1p)
**********************************************************

Gheat	0	Tj	value {abs(V(AD12,K)*v(net1))+abs(V(AD2,K)*v(net2))}

R0 N1 Tj 64.8m
R1 N2 N1 132.9m
R2 N3 N2 714m
R3 Tc N3 598.8m

C0 Tj 0 115.9u
C1 N1 0 522.7u
C2 N2 0 1.218m
C3 N3 0 8.566m

.ends C6D10065E

.subckt CAK_C6D10065 K AD14 A

.param Cjo = 850p
.param Vj  = 0.95
.param M   = 0.45

G12 K d1 value {
*+	if(V(K,A)>0,
+		(Cjo/(1+(limit(v(K,A),0,450)/Vj)**M))*ddt(v(K,A));
*+		,
*+		0
*+			)
+			}

R_CDS d1 AD14 1E-4

.ends CAK_C6D10065
